cloud-native.vibe_zh: 干净专业的 B2B SaaS 设计系统，卡片式布局，蓝灰主色，小圆角，信息密度中高，适合产品汇报
cloud-native.vibe_en: Clean professional B2B SaaS design system, card-based layout, blue-grey primary, small rounded corners, medium-high density, ideal for product presentations

swiss-grid.vibe_zh: 严格网格系统，高密度数据展示，无衬线大写标题，直角，信号红强调，像机场标识或咨询报告
swiss-grid.vibe_en: Strict grid system, high-density data display, sans-serif uppercase headings, right angles, signal-red accents, like airport signage or consulting decks

editorial-magazine.vibe_zh: 衬线字体主导的长文阅读体验，大图出血，双栏排版，大量留白，像《纽约时报杂志》或 Monocle
editorial-magazine.vibe_en: Serif-led long-form reading experience, large image bleeds, two-column layout, generous whitespace, like NYT Magazine or Monocle

sunlit-warmth.vibe_zh: 明亮温暖的社区感设计，奶油色底，阳光黄与暖橙点缀，大圆角，手写圆润感，像社区中心的手写海报
sunlit-warmth.vibe_en: Bright warm community-centric design, creamy base, sunshine yellow and warm orange accents, large rounded corners, handwritten roundness, like a community center hand-lettered poster

terminal-hacker.vibe_zh: 纯黑终端界面，等宽字体，绿色命令行，高密度日志感，ASCII 装饰边框，像 Linux tty 或 cmatrix
terminal-hacker.vibe_en: Pure black terminal interface, monospace fonts, green command line, high-density log feel, ASCII decorative borders, like Linux tty or cmatrix

y2k-kawaii.vibe_zh: 2000年代数字乐观主义，高饱和粉紫渐变，大圆角气泡按钮，粗体无衬线，活泼互动感
y2k-kawaii.vibe_en: 2000s digital optimism, high-saturation pink-purple gradients, large rounded bubble buttons, bold sans-serif, playful interactive feel
